name: r3draid3r04 Homelab
description: Docker Compose templates for a complete homelab setup including media management, monitoring, automation, and self-hosted services.

templates.name: AssetFlow
templates.description: Custom artwork management tool for Plex media libraries with TMDB and TVDB integration.

templates.name: FileBot
templates.description: Media file organizer and renamer with a web-based UI.

templates.name: FreshRSS
templates.description: Self-hosted RSS feed aggregator with a clean web interface.

templates.name: Glances
templates.description: Real-time system monitoring tool with a web UI for CPU, memory, disk, and network stats.

templates.name: HASS Unraid
templates.description: Custom Home Assistant integration for monitoring and controlling Unraid servers.

templates.name: Homepage
templates.description: Modern application dashboard with service integrations and Docker support.

templates.name: Huntarr
templates.description: Automated missing media hunter for Sonarr and Radarr.

templates.name: Immich
templates.description: Self-hosted photo and video management platform with machine learning features, Redis, and PostgreSQL.

templates.name: ImmichStats
templates.description: Statistics dashboard for Immich photo library.

templates.name: Kometa GUI
templates.description: Web-based GUI for Kometa (formerly Plex Meta Manager) with Mediux integration for managing Plex metadata and collections.

templates.name: MediaScan
templates.description: Plex media library scanner and analyzer for tracking media health.

templates.name: n8n
templates.description: Workflow automation platform with a visual editor for connecting APIs and services.

templates.name: Nexus
templates.description: Sonatype Nexus Repository Manager for hosting Docker images and other artifacts.

templates.name: Open WebUI
templates.description: Web interface for interacting with Ollama and other LLM backends.

templates.name: Scrypted
templates.description: Home video integration platform with hardware acceleration and automatic updates via Watchtower.

templates.name: Seerr
templates.description: Media request management tool (Jellyseerr) for Plex, Sonarr, and Radarr.

templates.name: Speedtest Tracker
templates.description: Automated internet speed test tracker with historical data and graphs.

templates.name: Tracearr
templates.description: Activity tracker for *arr stack applications with built-in PostgreSQL and Redis.

templates.name: Traefik
templates.description: Reverse proxy and SSL termination with Let's Encrypt and Cloudflare DNS challenge support.

templates.name: Trilium
templates.description: Hierarchical note-taking application with rich text editing and scripting.

templates.name: Uptime Kuma
templates.description: Self-hosted uptime monitoring tool with notifications and status pages.

templates.name: Vaultwarden
templates.description: Lightweight Bitwarden-compatible password manager server.

templates.name: VS Code Server
templates.description: Web-based VS Code editor powered by code-server with Traefik integration.

templates.name: What's Up Docker
templates.description: Docker container update notifier with MQTT and Home Assistant integration.

templates.name: Monitoring Stack
templates.description: Full monitoring infrastructure with Grafana, InfluxDB, Loki, Promtail, cAdvisor, SNMP exporter, and syslog-ng.
